constraints: Read model must consume the Foundation closure summary.
Read model must distinguish Foundation closure from live runtime terminal closure.

Evidence acceptance may be visible, but runtime admission, promotion, enablement, dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, connector authority, filesystem writes, network access, secret serialization, and success claims remain denied.
Projection must be fixture-derived and must not invoke live runtime.
non_goals: Do not claim live terminal closure.
Do not dispatch or invoke a worker.
Do not emit or append runtime receipts.
Do not serialize raw secret values.
problem_statement: After closing the read-only worker runtime chain for Foundation Mode, the operator still needed a direct read-only status projection that answers whether runtime is intentionally closed or still incomplete.
success_criteria: Status read model validates as SolvedVerified with proof_state Pass through its source closure summary.
Status read model reports evidence accepted for Foundation review while runtime admission and promotion remain denied.
Runtime enablement, dispatch, receipt append, and live terminal closure counts remain zero.
Focused validator, focused pytest, protocol manifest validation, SDLC artifact validation, schema validation, and whitespace checks pass.
